description_long: This bungalow features a two-story structure with a prominent orange gable roof and a fenced yard. The front facade includes a covered porch with decorative columns and a striped orange-and-white awning, providing shade to the entrance. The property is landscaped with several trees, shrubs, and a small patch of grass, and there is a blue vehicle parked on the driveway. The side and rear views reveal additional awnings, a swimming pool, and a mix of large and small windows, some grouped and others isolated. The exterior walls are primarily white with brick accents, and the property is enclosed by a low wooden fence. The overall design is modern with functional outdoor spaces and a clear separation between living and recreational areas.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with an orange gable roof, striped awnings, a covered porch, landscaped yard, and a fenced perimeter.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, orange gable roof, striped awning, and landscaped yard with trees and a pool in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long expanse of the roof, the striped awning, and the solid white wall with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the driveway with a blue vehicle, more striped awnings, and a clear view of the yard and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, additional awnings, a pool, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs within the fenced area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and isolated windows
